Entry.JapaneseText: <Dio>
Entry.EnglishText: <Dio>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Mel>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mel>

Entry.JapaneseText: エトス
Entry.EnglishText: Ethos

Entry.JapaneseText: アルベルト
Entry.EnglishText: Albert

Entry.JapaneseText: Variable
Entry.EnglishText: Variable

Entry.JapaneseText: なー、なんでそんな何回も温泉に入んだ？
Entry.EnglishText: Wh-Why were you going in and out of the hot springs?

Entry.JapaneseText: え？ だって気持ちいいよ？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Well, it feels nice.

Entry.JapaneseText: そっかー？ めんどくせーじゃん
Entry.EnglishText: It does? It's kind of a pain though.

Entry.JapaneseText: <Dio>は昔からお風呂嫌いだもんね
Entry.EnglishText: Hahah...No wonder. You've always hated baths, <Dio>

Entry.JapaneseText: そりゃ汚れたり、汗でベトベトすりゃ 入っけど、意味もなく何度も入んのはワケわかんね
Entry.EnglishText: I mean I at least get taking a bath because you're icky and all...But doing it just because...? Not really.

Entry.JapaneseText: そう？ でも温泉は体にいいんだよ
Entry.EnglishText: You think so? Hot springs can be good for you though.

Entry.JapaneseText: それってなんかじじくせー
Entry.EnglishText: Wow you sounded just like a grandpa just now.

Entry.JapaneseText: ま〜ったく、この毛無しのハゲぼうずは、 本当にロマンがわかってねーやつだ
Entry.EnglishText: Oh for goodness sake! I fear this feather-headed nincompoop might never get the notion of romance.

Entry.JapaneseText: ロマン、ロマンうるせー！ このタンス野郎が！
Entry.EnglishText: Romance shromance! What do you know? You're just a cabinet!

Entry.JapaneseText: 温泉といえば覗きイベントだべ。 混浴って手もあるだよ
Entry.EnglishText: Well when we talk about hot springs, there's the activity of sneaking in a peek. Mixed-bathing also!

Entry.JapaneseText: ……おまえ……男とか女とかわかってんのか？
Entry.EnglishText: You...Do you really get boys and girls?

Entry.JapaneseText: 男湯には男しか入れない、女湯には女しか入れない！ だからタンス、おまえに入れる『湯』は、ない！
Entry.EnglishText: Only men can go in the men's bath, and women in the womens' bath! There's no bath for a wardrobe like you!

Entry.JapaneseText: ……『タンス湯』とかありゃ、おまえも入れたのにな。 いやそもそも、湯に浸かったらマズイだろ？
Entry.EnglishText: Even if there is a bath for "wardrobes"... can one even fit you?

Entry.JapaneseText: あ〜、んなもん関係ねーだ〜。 おらはどこにでも行ける、自由な小鳥さんだーよ
Entry.EnglishText: Aghh! That's irrelevant! I go wherever I want! I am a free bird!

Entry.JapaneseText: ぬはっ！ そ、そうだ、そうだよ。おらが温泉に入っだら <Mel><Mel>のだ〜いじな衣装がびしょ濡れに……
Entry.EnglishText: Gwagh! Th-That's right...<Mel>'s clothes would get ruined if I were to take a plunge!

Entry.JapaneseText: ……なんか知んねーけど、勝った……
Entry.EnglishText: ...I don't know what just happened...but it looks like I won.

Entry.JapaneseText: ……ばかなことやってないで、ほら、行くよ……
Entry.EnglishText: Stop saying nonesense... let's go.
